# hush_artifactory_integration (Resource)

Manages a Hush Security Artifactory integration for scanning Artifactory repositories for secrets and sensitive data.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manage an Artifactory integration
resource "hush_artifactory_integration" "example" {
  name    = "my-artifactory"
  org_url = "https://mycompany.jfrog.io"
  token   = var.artifactory_token
}

# With write-only token (recommended for production)
resource "hush_artifactory_integration" "secure" {
  name             = "my-artifactory-secure"
  org_url          = "https://mycompany.jfrog.io"
  token_wo         = var.artifactory_token
  token_wo_version = "v1"
}

# With optional description
resource "hush_artifactory_integration" "with_description" {
  name        = "my-artifactory-with-desc"
  description = "Artifactory integration for scanning repositories"
  org_url     = "https://mycompany.jfrog.io"
  token       = var.artifactory_token
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the Artifactory integration

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `description` (String) The description of the Artifactory integration
- `onprem_deployment_id` (String) The ID of the on-premises deployment to associate with this integration
- `org_url` (String) The Artifactory organization URL (e.g., https://mycompany.jfrog.io)
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The access token for Artifactory authentication
- `token_wo` (String, Sensitive, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) The access token for Artifactory authentication (write-only). This is more secure than `token` because Terraform will not store this value in the state file. Either `token` or `token_wo` must be specified.
- `token_wo_version` (String) Used to trigger updates for `token_wo`. This value should be changed when the token changes. Can be any value (e.g., a timestamp, version number, or hash).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Artifactory integration
- `status` (String) The current status of the integration
- `status_message` (String) The status message providing additional details about the integration status
- `webhook_provisioned` (Boolean) Whether the webhook has been provisioned for this integration
